preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)

whatsNew: Mac auth completely rebuilt — in-app sign-in window auto-captures OAuth code
No more 'Paste this into Claude Code' — redirect intercepted automatically
Session blocked until auth completes — no more blank loading screens
